---
name: Feature request
about: Suggest a lightweight coordination or evidence-gate improvement
title: "[Feature]: "
labels: enhancement
assignees: ""
---

## Problem

What manual coordination problem should AutoLoop help with?

## Proposed Scope

Describe the smallest useful change.

## Non-Goals

List behavior that should remain out of scope, especially automatic dispatch, autonomous execution, merge, release, deployment, credentials, hardware, or production actions.

## Evidence

Share the real workflow evidence or repeated pain point that justifies the change. Do not include private project data or credentials.
